description: Composition Blue kurta made of 100% cotton, has a mandarin collar with a V-neck, mix-and-match printed panels along the placket, cuffs and above the vented hem, mildly pleated below the bustline and has three-quarter sleeves Fit Regular Wash care Wash separately in cold water Do not bleach Dry in shade Medium to hot iron Designed to celebrate womanhood in all its facets, this kurta from biba is inspired by traditional Indian print and dye arts that make it a special wardrobe favourite. The soft cotton fabric offers exemplary comfort, while the mix-and-match piping adds zing to the garment. Team it with leggings, chunky accessories and heeled sandals. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 5'7" and chest 32"
